_meta.description: Machine-readable topical authority cluster hierarchy. Tells Google exactly how content relates for topical authority signals.
_meta.technique: Topic Cluster Silo - each supporting page links to its pillar, not to other clusters.

clusters.name: Metabolic Health & Circadian Nutrition
clusters.description: Central pillar covering the intersection of circadian biology, metabolic health, and therapeutic nutrition.

clusters.name: Insulin Resistance & Blood Sugar Management
clusters.description: Complete coverage of insulin resistance management through circadian nutrition and therapeutic herbs.

clusters.name: Weight Management & Metabolic Reset
clusters.description: Evidence-based weight management through circadian eating windows and metabolic optimization.

clusters.name: MASLD (Fatty Liver) Reversal
clusters.description: Comprehensive fatty liver reversal through fructose elimination, circadian eating, and hepatic support herbs.

clusters.name: Hormonal Health & Endocrine Balance
clusters.description: Pillar covering hormonal balance through anti-inflammatory nutrition, circadian alignment, and herbal support.

clusters.name: PCOS/PCOD Management
clusters.description: PCOS management through insulin-sensitizing nutrition, anti-inflammatory herbs, and circadian rhythm restoration.

clusters.name: Thyroid Dysfunction & Hashimoto's Support
clusters.description: Thyroid support through selenium-rich nutrition, gluten reduction, and circadian rhythm optimization.

clusters.name: Stress, Cortisol & Circadian Dysregulation
clusters.description: Stress and cortisol regulation through adaptogenic herbs, circadian eating, and sleep nutrition.

clusters.name: Gut Health & Microbiome Optimization
clusters.description: Pillar covering digestive health through anti-inflammatory nutrition, microbiome support, and circadian eating.

clusters.name: Cardiovascular & Inflammation Management
clusters.description: Cardiovascular support through anti-inflammatory nutrition, blood pressure management, and lipid optimization.

siloRules.description: Each supporting page MUST link back to its cluster pillar. Supporting pages within the same cluster may cross-link. Cross-cluster linking is minimized.
rules: Every supporting page links to its cluster pillar page
Supporting pages within the same cluster may cross-link freely
Cross-cluster links are limited to 1-2 per page maximum
Pillar pages link to all their cluster pages
The home page links to all pillar pages
